student.gradesPendingTerm: Second-semester grades are not complete yet. Grades and GPA appear here after all current-term scores (practical + theory) are published.
student.gpaAfterTermComplete: Cumulative GPA is calculated after all second-semester grades are complete.

TRANSCRIPT_READY.title: Transcript ready
TRANSCRIPT_READY.body: Your request was approved — download your PDF

APPEAL_RESOLVED.title: Appeal resolved
APPEAL_RESOLVED.body: See the appeals page for details

PRACTICAL_GRADE_PUBLISHED.title: Practical grade
PRACTICAL_GRADE_PUBLISHED.body: Your practical grade for {{courseName}} is available

transcripts.studentLead: Request an official transcript for $5 (simulated). After payment, student affairs reviews the request, then the exam officer generates and delivers your PDF.
transcripts.affairsLead: Review paid requests: approve to forward to the exam officer, or reject with a reason and automatic fee refund notice.
transcripts.examOfficerLead: Requests approved by student affairs — generate the PDF and deliver to the student.
transcripts.examOfficerEmpty: No requests waiting for PDF generation.
transcripts.rejectHint: Provide a clear reason — the student will see it and a refund notice.
transcripts.rejectPlaceholder: e.g. Incomplete records; please visit student affairs.
transcripts.refundMessage: ${{amount}} has been refunded to your account (demo).
transcripts.payDescription: Official grade transcript request fee. Payment is simulated for demonstration.
transcripts.activeRequestHint: You already have a request in progress.

examOfficer.studentsLead: Browse registered students by department and study year, then export a formatted Excel list.
examOfficer.studentsSelectHint: Select a department, then a study year to load students.
examOfficer.studentsEmpty: No students in this department for the selected year.
examOfficer.dashboardLead: Manage transcripts and grade batches from faculty.
examOfficer.dashboardHint: Use the sidebar to open each queue.

excel.selectFiltersFirst: Select department and study year first.

gradeSubmissions.facultyLead: Choose a course (name — department — plan year). We are in term 2: enter practical grades, then theory after practical is published.
gradeSubmissions.selectCourseOnly: Select a course to load the section roster.
gradeSubmissions.selectCourseAndYear: Select a course to load the student roster.
gradeSubmissions.rulesHint: Practical pass: 16/40. Totals 58–59 are raised to 60. Term 1 grades are complete in records; entry is for term 2 only.
gradeSubmissions.firstTermClosed: This is a first-term course — grades are already complete and cannot be edited here.
gradeSubmissions.submittedPractical: Practical grades sent to the exam officer.
gradeSubmissions.submittedTheory: Theory grades sent to the exam officer.
gradeSubmissions.practicalPublishedEnterTheory: Practical grades are published — you can now enter theory grades.
gradeSubmissions.theoryLockedUntilPractical: Theory grades are locked until the exam officer publishes practical grades.
gradeSubmissions.secondTermClosed: Second-semester grades are not available yet.
gradeSubmissions.practicalPublished: Practical grades published and students notified.
gradeSubmissions.examOfficerLead: Review batches: publish practical first, then theory (58–59 gets assistance to 60).
gradeSubmissions.submitted: Grades sent to the exam officer.
gradeSubmissions.awaitingExamOfficer: With the exam officer — editing locked until rejected or published.
gradeSubmissions.publishedHint: All grades for this section are published to students.
gradeSubmissions.enterAtLeastOne: Enter at least one student grade.

studentCourses.lead: Courses for {{year}} — first and second term.
studentCourses.empty: No courses are listed for your current study year yet.

studyPlan.lead: View courses per study year split into two terms, with practical and theory scores and year GPA.
studyPlan.passLegend: Practical pass: 16/40. Below 16 is a fail and theory is blocked. Scores update automatically when published.

profile.lead: Your account and academic record at a glance.
profile.noStudentRecord: No student profile linked to this account. Contact student affairs.

faculty.coursesLead: Courses you are assigned to teach this term.
faculty.noCoursesAssigned: No courses assigned yet. Contact the administrator.
faculty.gradeTermHint: Term and academic year are taken from the selected course automatically.

admin.noCoursesSelected: No courses added yet. Pick college, year, and term, then add courses.

activityLog.lead: History of actions you sent, received, or stored.

librarian.dashboardLead: Usage analytics and full control over the digital collection.

labels.title: Title
labels.author: Author
labels.courseCodeAutoHint: Leave empty to auto-generate — e.g. INFO_ENG-Y1-S1-C05
labels.facultyCoursesAssign: Assigned courses (hold Ctrl to select multiple)

messages.transcriptForwarded: Approved and sent to the exam officer.
messages.transcriptDelivered: Transcript generated and delivered to the student.
messages.forbidden: You do not have access to this page.
messages.adminWelcome: Manage users, news, appeals, and the audit trail from here.
messages.affairsWelcome: Track and fulfill official transcript requests.
messages.managerWelcome: Manage your college: courses, students, news, and requests to administration.
messages.adminCurriculumLead: View and edit study-plan courses by department, year, and term. Changes apply for all students and faculty.
messages.managerCurriculumLead: Browse your college courses by department, year, and term (read-only).
messages.managerStudentsLead: View and edit your college students with filtering by study year.
messages.managerRequestsLead: Submit a request to central administration (e.g. new course, plan change, or policy action).
messages.adminManagerRequestsLead: Review and respond to college manager requests.
messages.curriculumCreated: Course added to the study plan.
messages.curriculumDeleted: Course removed from the study plan.
messages.confirmDeleteCurriculum: Delete «{{name}}» from the study plan? Related enrollments and grades will be removed.
messages.selectDepartmentFirst: Select a department to view courses.
messages.adminUsersLead: Create accounts, assign roles and colleges, reset passwords, and deactivate users.
messages.affairsStudentsLead: Update student departments, university IDs, and academic years.
messages.facultyGradesLead: Select your section, fill the grade table, and submit to the exam officer.
messages.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this user? They will not be able to sign in.
messages.noStudentsInSection: No students enrolled in this course yet.
messages.libraryLead: Open PDFs in a new tab or download them. Usage counters update automatically.
messages.studentLibraryLead: Browse university library books, read or download them, and save titles to your favorites.
messages.studentFavoriteBooksLead: Books you saved — you can remove them here anytime.
messages.newsTimelineLead: Announcements in chronological order — each item has its own space.
messages.librarianBooksLead: Upload PDF books for students to read and download.
messages.bookFileMissing: PDF file is not available on the server.

news.collegeFilterHint: Showing your college news plus university-wide announcements.
news.managerCollegeHint: “My college only” posts are published for {{college}}.
news.coverImageHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP — shown full width with fixed height.

tuition.lead: Annual tuition is $1,000 ($500 per semester). Payments are simulated for demonstration.
tuition.payFirstSemesterFirst: You must pay the first semester installment before the second.
tuition.semesterPaid: This semester installment is fully paid.
tuition.secondSemesterWaitingAdmin: Second semester payment opens when administration publishes an announcement.
tuition.enablePaymentOnDashboard: Enable pay button on student dashboard
tuition.paymentLead: Simulated secure checkout — no real payment gateway.
tuition.simulatedNote: Portfolio demo — payment is recorded locally only.
tuition.discountLead: Submit supporting documents for eligible discount categories.
tuition.discountRejectedDefault: Request does not meet eligibility criteria.

library.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, author, publisher, or keywords…
library.emptyFilteredDescription: Try different criteria or reset filters to see more titles.
library.emptyDescription: This section is ready for new titles. Check back soon or try another section.
library.favoritesEmptyDescription: Save books from the university library and they will appear here for quick access later.

appeals.none: You have not submitted any appeals yet.
